case_title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. ORI STAV HILLEL ET AL

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 664.6 IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND A SEPARATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. MATTER NOT REPORTED. BAILIFF: NGUYEN. (301/RCE)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILLEL, ORI STAV AKA ORI S HILLEL $876.62 PRINCIPAL, $353.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,230.12, SEE SCANNED DOC

Motion To Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Enter Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's Motion To Enter Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion to Enter Judgment Pursuant to CCP section 664.6 is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and a separate proposed judgment.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Nguyen. (301/RCE)
